creator: kevinz5000@gmail.com
text:
Hi again,

RedPorts came back up and I did a build of the new ports. Apparently
audio/guspat fails on plist with one leftover file
(share/guspat/timidity.cfg.bak).

I'll take a look at this and hopefully fix it all up to be commit-ready
this weekend, unless someone feels like submitting a patch.

Build log:
https://redports.org/~Partmedia/20130426022816-34774-116189/guspat-20000706_2.log

Thanks,
Kevin Zheng
